user.description: Enter your Kakao Developers REST API key. It is validated with a single keyword search call.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by Kakao (HTTP 401).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kakao API. Check your network and try again.

abort.already_configured: Kakao Map is already configured. Only one entry is supported.

point_input_conflict.message: Specify either an entity or coordinates for {role}, not both.

point_input_missing.message: Specify an entity or coordinates for {role}.

invalid_waypoint.message: Invalid waypoint "{value}". Expected an entity ID or "latitude,longitude".
